arts.ttl: 'Extremely disappointed' Blackburn release John Eustace statement amid Derby County links
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Eustace, thought to be disappointed by a less than inspiring transfer window at Ewood Park, then held talks with Rovers' hierarchy this afternoon about his desire to speak to Derby and the Championsip club say they have "reluctantly granted" that request.

arts.ttl: Blackburn boss Eustace set for Derby move
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers "reluctantly" give boss John Eustace permission to speak to Derby County about their managerial vacancy.

arts.ttl: Matt Hamshaw primed for duty as Derby County pursue John Eustace
arts.sum: Interim boss Matt Hamshaw says he is comfortable with being in charge of Derby County's clash against Oxford tomrrow night and insists the club are working hard as they can to appoint a new manager. Asked this afternoon about the situation and whether there was a timeframe he was working to, Hamshaw said: "No and I am quite comfortable with that and they are too.

arts.ttl: Blackburn truth, David Clowes move - Derby County handed clear John Eustace next manager verdict - Leigh Curtis - Derbyshire Live
arts.sum: John Eustace is Derby County's prime target to become the club's next manager, as Derbyshire Live understands a formal approach made to Championship competitors Blackburn Rovers . Derby were handed a reality check when they played Eustace's Blackburn on the opening day of the season, being swept aside 4-2 at Ewood Park, and witnessed first-hand what his teams can do to their rivals and David Clowes will have seen that too.

Derby were heading for a narrow defeat against Norwich on Saturday before a stoppage-time Jerry Yates penalty rescued a point for the Rams. Paul Warne was sacked before the game at Carrow Road, and h...

arts.ttl: Derby County v Oxford injury latest as four set to miss return of Gary Rowett
arts.sum: The winger looks certain to be out of the clash tomorrow after damaging his hamstring in the defeat to Cardiff. With first-team coach Matt Hamshaw set to be in charge tomorrow, Derby will still have players missing through injury as they look for a victory that could potentially take them out of the bottom three.

arts.ttl: What Derby County can expect from John Eustace as ex-Ram leads managerial race
arts.sum: It is no surprise to anyone who watched Birmingham City under John Eustace that he has developed into a useful Championship manager. The search for his successor has led Derby to Eustace, who has guided Blackburn Rovers to sixth in the Championship after 31 matches.

arts.ttl: John Eustace update as Blackburn Rovers boss set for crunch talks over Derby County approach
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers boss John Eustace will take training as normal before entering crunch talks over his future after Derby County made an official approach in their bid to make him their new manager. According the Lancashire Evening Telegraph, Eustace is due to take Rovers training as normal but will then meet with Steve Waggott and Suhail Pasha to express his desire to speak with the Rams about a move to Pride Park.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers told 'alarm bells' are ringing as Derby County push for John Eustace move
arts.sum: Speaking after Rovers’ 2-0 FA Cup loss to Wolves, Eustace acknowledged the official approach and said he would need to sit down with the hierarchy at Ewood Park for talks over his future. “It's something where I now need to speak to the owners to see what they think as well.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers will fume over key factor if John Eustace leaves for Derby County: Opinion
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers have had a strong season to date and a big figure in their surprise play-off tilt… The post Blackburn Rovers will fume over key factor if John Eustace leaves for Derby County: Opinion appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
